_publications._publicationTitle: Use of machine learning to predict cognitive performance based on brain metabolism in Neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Small differences between NF1 patients and the control group were noticed in...planning (Tower of London)
details: Showed small effect size for planning abilities between NF1 and controls (28.69 ± 3.91 vs 29.56 ± 3.16, d=0.25)
